title: Implement typed Heimlern outcome consumer smoke
goal: Implement a dedicated, review-only Heimlern consumer for the merged Chronik operator-outcome envelope; validate both contract layers and emit an auditable report or bounded proposal without applying policy.

acceptance.assertion: A dedicated consumer parses chronik.operator-routing-outcome-export.v1 rather than routing the artifact through the unrelated generic AussenEvent path.
The consumer validates envelope identity, pinned Heimlern payload contract revision/digest, canonical payload digest, deterministic event id and evidence-reference digests before analysis.
Freshness is recomputed at read time with an explicit policy; duplicate event ids are handled deterministically without double-counting evidence.
The smoke emits a bounded report, a policy.weight_adjustment.v1 proposal that validates, or a typed insufficient-evidence result.
No routing policy, live weights, Chronik history or Grabowski execution state is mutated; no-auto-apply non-claims survive the output.
Focused tests cover valid input, contract drift, payload/event digest mismatch, stale input, duplicate input, secret/raw-field rejection and insufficient evidence.

metadata.source_decision: Chronik selected as primary integration organ for heimlern because it owns append-only historical outcomes.
metadata.scope_basis: T001 live audit plus merged Chronik PR #214.
metadata.consumer_gap: The existing Heimlern Chronik CLI consumes AussenEvent and must not be reused as an implicit routing-outcome parser.
validation: Heimlern PR #200 reports 37 Python tests and 76 Rust tests plus documentation tests passed.
GitHub workflow runs 29132762201 (ai-context guard) and 29132762273 (rust cached) completed successfully for the reviewed head.
Current Heimlern main retains the dedicated chronik_outcome_consumer.py path with exact contract pins, digest checks, freshness recomputation, deterministic duplicate handling and redaction.
The fixture smoke emitted insufficient_evidence with review_only=true and writes=[]; no routing policy, Chronik history or Grabowski execution state was mutated.

verified_acceptance.typed-envelope-input: Heimlern PR #200 adds scripts/chronik_outcome_consumer.py for chronik.operator-routing-outcome-export.v1 and explicitly keeps the generic AussenEvent path separate.
verified_acceptance.identity-and-digest-validation: The consumer validates strict JSON, immutable mirror pins, both schemas, contract identities, canonical payload/event digests and evidence-reference identity before analysis.
verified_acceptance.freshness-and-duplicates: Read-time freshness is explicit and deterministic; duplicate event and decision identities are deduplicated while conflicting identities fail closed.
verified_acceptance.proposal-schema-valid: The fixture smoke returns typed insufficient_evidence, and the focused tests cover a schema-valid policy.weight_adjustment.v1 proposal candidate.
verified_acceptance.review-only: Reports are review_only=true with writes=[] and explicit non-claims; no policy, history or execution state is changed.
verified_acceptance.tests: Focused coverage includes valid input, contract and mirror drift, payload/event/evidence digest mismatch, stale and future input, duplicate and conflicting identities, sensitive fields, bounds, typed failures and insufficient evidence.

metadata.outcome: The dedicated typed Heimlern consumer is merged and CI-verified; the bridge remains offline and proposal-only without a live Grabowski producer.

verification.plan_sha256_scope: plan document with T003 implementation note
